subcodes.first_line: Do not withhold from this handful of dust the vibrations of the blessed Word, nor deprive it of the warmth of love, O Ocean of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مشت خاک را از اهتزاز کلمهٴ مبارکه منع منما و از حرارت محبت محروم مساز دریاهای عالم
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @wisdom [hikmat], @education of children; moral education
